LanguageData.UB_SNS_KidMothFarmer.title: Moth farmer
LanguageData.UB_SNS_KidMothFarmer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised on [PAWN_possessive]'s family farm raising and caring for Silkmoths. [PAWN_possessive] main job was to harvest the delicate silk the moths would produce, and process it into beautiful bolts of moth silk and silken clothes.
